name: clankers-email
description: Send and read emails via Fastmail JMAP — no third-party services needed

tool_definitions.name: send_email
tool_definitions.description: Send an email via Fastmail JMAP. Requires FASTMAIL_API_TOKEN env var. Returns confirmation or error.

from.description: Sender address (defaults to CLANKERS_EMAIL_FROM env var)

html.description: If true, body is treated as HTML (default: false)

tool_definitions.name: list_mailboxes
tool_definitions.description: List Fastmail mailboxes (folders) for the account. Useful for verifying config works.
